backend/main.mo: Motoko backend actor implementing user registration with auth codes, code-based authentication, user connections, and queries for users and connection status using in-memory maps.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report identifying an error investigation task related to ConnectPage.tsx in the deployed Version 2 application.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing summaries of all frontend source files including pages, hooks, components, and configuration files for the code-based chat application.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom OKLCH color system variables for light and dark themes, including coral and teal accent colors.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the Code Chat application that loads the React app from main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main app component configuring TanStack Router with routes for landing, register, login, connect, and chat pages within a shared layout.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Footer component displaying copyright, caffeine.ai attribution with UTM tracking, and social media links.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Header component with navigation, auth code display for logged-in users, and login/logout functionality using code-based authentication.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React Query hook that creates and manages the backend actor instance with Internet Identity authentication and automatic query invalidation on identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useCodeAuth.tsx: React context provider managing code-based authentication state with local storage persistence, providing login, logout, and setAuth functions.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: React context provider for Internet Identity authentication using AuthClient, managing login status, identity state, and authentication lifecycle.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for user registration, connecting users, fetching all users, checking connection status, and retrieving users by code using the backend actor.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables for light/dark themes, including custom coral and teal color utilities using OKLCH color space.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React Query, Internet Identity provider, and renders the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/ChatPage.tsx: Displays a placeholder page indicating the chat feature is under development and requires additional backend methods for messaging functionality.
frontend/src/pages/ConnectPage.tsx: Allows authenticated users to connect with others by entering their auth code, validates the code against registered users, and initiates connections.
frontend/src/pages/LandingPage.tsx: Marketing landing page showcasing the app's features (simple registration, one-to-one chats, security) with a call-to-action button directing to login or connect.
frontend/src/pages/LoginPage.tsx: Login form where users enter their unique code to authenticate and access the app, with navigation to registration for new users.
frontend/src/pages/RegisterPage.tsx: Registration form for new users to create an account with a display name, receive a unique auth code, and automatically authenticate after registration.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration file defining custom color schemes using OKLCH color space, extended theme settings including container, border radius, shadows, fonts, and animation keyframes for accordion components.
project_state.json: Project state metadata tracking a fix request for a Version 2 deployment error, with pending feature requests for user data migration verification and code-based authentication flow testing.
